name: janko
description: Modularny Superbot Discord w architekturze Domain-First.

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const {execFileSync}=require('child_process'); function walk(dir){ for(const f of fs.readdirSync(dir)){ if(f==='node_modules' || f==='.git' || f==='artifacts') continue; const p=path.join(dir,f); if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()) walk(p); else if(p.endsWith('.js')) { console.log('Checking:', p); execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',p],{stdio:'inherit'}); } } } walk('.')" && npm run validate
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run check:prisma

author: Mateo
